Instruction Table

Source: vignettes/instructions-table.Rmd
instructions-table.Rmd

Participant-facing instruction text from the 13 norming datasets included in lexis, extracted from source PDFs via LLM and stored as norming_instructions.

library(lexis)
library(DT)
DT::datatable(
  norming_instructions,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 15,
    autoWidth = TRUE,
    scrollX = TRUE
  )
)

Developed by Jay Timm.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
